policy_statement: By 2050, Dakar aims to achieve a 54% reduction in GHG emissions, a 75% reduction in the energy bill of the City’s built heritage, and at least a 65% share of renewable energy in the energy mix.

Dakar will pursue adaptation objectives including strengthening climate/coastal/urban pollution data networks; reducing vulnerable populations through awareness; reducing heatwave vulnerability; increasing protection initiatives; reducing air pollutants by 2030; increasing urban green spaces by 150 ha by 2030; expanding ecological urban agriculture by 2030; and increasing climate-resilient infrastructure.
